name: Kabir More
description: Kabir leads product vision and platform architecture of Connect. He focuses on building scalable systems such as escrow protection, Job Success Score algorithms, and structured workflows.

name: Rohan Patil
description: Rohan leads the marketing and growth strategy of Connect, focusing on digital marketing, user acquisition, and building a strong brand presence.

name: Samarth Shendge
description: Samarth leads the technical vision of Connect, ensuring the platform is robust, scalable, and performance-driven. He oversees backend development, API architecture, and database management.

name: Vijay Biradar
description: Vijay drives the product strategy of Connect, focusing on creating a seamless and user-friendly experience for both clients and freelancers.

name: Vaibhav Pawar
description: Vaibhav oversees the operational flow of Connect, managing workflows, coordinating between team members, and ensuring testing and quality assurance.
